summary: Tools report success (exit 0) when zero BMPs were written: ++saved is unconditional, write_bmp failure is ignored, and the output dir is never created.
failure_scenario: Run famitv_loopback loopback_out (or famitv_play … --dump out) before the dir exists → every fopen fails, program prints saved=3/4 and returns 0; --dump with no arg dumps to a dir literally named "0".

summary: --crt-beam 0 makes inv_sig2 = 1/(2*beam*beam) = +inf; at pixels where scanline phase d==0, -(d*d)*inf = NaN reaches static_cast<uint32_t>(NaN) — UB.
failure_scenario: famitv_play … --crt --crt-beam 0: NaN survives exp/clamp (NaN compares false) and the float→uint32 cast is undefined (garbage/crash), worsened by -ffast-math.

summary: apply_scanlines casts a possibly-negative float to uint8_t; the guard only blocks opt_scanlines<=0, not >1.
failure_scenario: --scanlines 1.5 → keep=-0.5 → (px&0xff)*keep negative → static_cast<uint8_t>(-100.0f) is UB (negative float → unsigned not modulo-defined).

summary: AM envelope amp = 0.75 - ire*0.00625 is never clamped to >=0, so saturated colors (>120 IRE) in the generic path drive amp negative and invert the carrier phase instead of clamping the envelope at 0.
failure_scenario: famitv_play --generic on a fully saturated bright pixel (~133 IRE) emits a 180°-phase-inverted IQ sample; default real_nes path caps at 100 IRE and is unaffected.

summary: famidec (primary app) previously required hackrf+SDL2 (hard configure failure if missing); now it is silently skipped via message(STATUS ...), dropping the loud-failure invariant.
failure_scenario: A machine/CI missing libhackrf or SDL2 gets a 'successful' configure+build with famidec never produced; only a STATUS line (swallowed by the script's >/dev/null) hints at it.

summary: sdl2_iface if(TARGET SDL2::SDL2)/elseif(PkgConfig::SDL2) has no else, so a config package exporting a different target name leaves it empty while SDL2_FOUND is still true.
failure_scenario: SDL2 exported as SDL2::SDL2-static (or flat includes) → famidec/famitv_play (gated only on SDL2_FOUND) link a no-op interface and fail with 'SDL2/SDL.h not found' / undefined SDL_* symbols.

summary: get_sysinfo, audio/input setters, and unload_game/deinit are called unconditionally though not in Core::load()'s required-symbol set (only a warning is printed on missing dlsym).
failure_scenario: A libretro core missing any of these mandatory exports passes load()'s check, then null-derefs at get_sysinfo (line 281) / set_input_state (291) / unload_game (429).

summary: composite_ire's generic chroma path calls std::sin(theta)+std::cos(theta) per active sample, reintroducing the per-sample trig cost the class eliminated for the carrier via phasor recurrence.
failure_scenario: ~252k trig calls/field (~12M per 48-field loopback run); the class comment says it switched to a running-phasor multiply specifically to avoid this.

summary: famitv_loopback defines its own write_bmp duplicating src/util/bmp.hpp (~35 lines) instead of including the shared helper famitv_play already uses.
failure_scenario: Two copies already diverged (bool vs void return, different fopen-fail diagnostic); any fix to one won't propagate to the other.

summary: video_cb reinterpret_casts a core-supplied byte row (src + y*pitch) to uint32_t*/uint16_t* without alignment checks.
failure_scenario: A core reporting a pitch/data not multiple-of-4/2 makes the load misaligned — UB (SIGBUS on strict-align targets) and a strict-aliasing violation.

summary: Script only checks whether build/famitv_play is missing, builds, then unconditionally execs it — but CMake creates that target only when SDL2_FOUND AND EXISTS libretro.h.
failure_scenario: Without the sibling nestopia checkout or SDL2, cmake --build exits 0 (target skipped), then exec fails with an opaque 'No such file or directory' with no cause shown.

summary: index_of breaks ties by first array index, so pure black (0,0,0) resolves to color 13 ($0D, blacker-than-black) instead of the safe $0F, forcing a constant 0.350V (-11.6 IRE) pedestal for every black pixel.
failure_scenario: Default real_nes path: (0,0,0) → nes_ntsc_signal(13) → 0.350V vs the file's own reference black 0.518V; a real fidelity deviation (often floored back to black by the decoder).

summary: ftell() == -1 (seek/tell failure) is used to size a vector without checking.
failure_scenario: On a FIFO/device/IO error sz=-1 → vector<uint8_t>(SIZE_MAX) throws uncaught length_error/bad_alloc (abort), leaving fp unclosed.

summary: build_glow comment claims a 'brightness threshold so only lit areas glow' but no threshold exists — it is a plain 4x4 box average; the header pipeline comment also mis-orders brightness vs halation/vignette.
failure_scenario: Dark/mid areas bloom as much as highlights; a Metal-shader author porting the 'identical' math per the file's stated intent would add a cutoff the CPU reference never had.

summary: audio_sample_cb queues to SDL with no latency cap, unlike audio_batch_cb which bounds the queue to ~0.2s.
failure_scenario: A core driving audio via the single-sample callback grows the SDL queue without bound if render outruns playback (latent; nestopia uses the batch path).
